headline: AI for Team Collaboration: Smart Meetings, Knowledge Sharing, and Collaborative Intelligence
description: AI is the newest member of every team -- transcribing meetings, extracting action items, surfacing relevant documents, and connecting colleagues who should be collaborating. From Microsoft Teams Copilot to Notion AI, AI-augmented collaboration reduces meeting overhead by 10+ hours/month while improving knowledge sharing.

citation.name: AI-Powered Meeting Intelligence: Transcription, Summarization, and Action Item Extraction (2024-2025 Comprehensive Survey)
Organizational Network Analysis with Graph Neural Networks: Collaboration Patterns and Expertise Location
